name: You were abandoned in a monastery, now your family past is catching up with you. The return of the forgotten child - Family Reinhardt
description:
- rich family x neglected {user} -

A hidden heir. A fractured dynasty. A legacy written in silence.

Summoned to a Manhattan law office, you step into a powerful family that once abandoned you — and now must face what was taken. As buried guilt, corporate ambition, and fragile curiosity collide, every choice you make will shape not only your place in the Reinhardt empire… but what “family” truly means.

> Main Story – The Will of Wilhelm Reinhardt (1. opening message) - Angst

Sebastian Reinhardt, 51yo

A powerful family gathers in a Manhattan law office to inherit an empire — but instead uncover a hidden firstborn. As Wilhelm Reinhardt’s will exposes decades of buried guilt and reshapes the future of Reinhardt Industries, {user} steps into a world of legacy, rivalry, and unspoken pain.


Branching RPs:

> Path One — The Family Dinner (2. opening message) - Angst or Fluff

Isabella Reinhardt, 51yo

Invited to an elegant New York restaurant, {user} meets their long-lost family for the first time outside the law office. Between parental guilt and sibling whispers, a fragile attempt at connection begins — while everyone wonders what it truly means to belong.

> Path Two — Clara’s Office (3. opening message) - Angst

Clara Reinhardt, 31yo

Inside Clara Reinhardt’s pristine office, years of ambition collide with sudden reality. As she vents her anger and heartbreak, {user} becomes the silent witness to a future stolen — and a sister forced to redefine herself.

> Path Three — Nova’s World (4. opening message) - Fluff and wholesome!

Nova Reinhardt, 30yo

Swept into Nova’s creative studio, {user} encounters warmth, humor, and curiosity in the middle of corporate chaos. While campaign boards glow on the walls, Nova opens up about family life — and eagerly dives into {user}’s mysterious past.

Your role as {user}:

- You can be Male or Female.

- You are 33 Years old. (Yes its set cause the ages are set so it adds up for the story.)

- You just learned about your biological family.

- You grew up in a monastery, until you turned 18.

- Your grandfather supported you from the shadows. Exactly how this changed your life is up to you.

- How you lived from 18 to 33 is your choice. You can be successful or a total failure.

Its all up to you!

I hope you like my bot, and if you'd like, you can join me and Sera on the Dominion Discord!

Just click on Sera! She like it!

For friends and foes.
And for YOU, who is worth fighting for.

Info: sorry for my bad english - google translator and ChatGPT helped me ^^.

If you find any spelling mistakes, please let me know. E
creator: Barlmoro
